questions.stem_en: What does California law require all drivers and vehicle owners to maintain at all times?
questions.stem_zhHant: 加州法律要求所有駕駛員和車主始終保持什麼？
questions.explanation_en: California law requires all drivers and vehicle owners to maintain financial responsibility (insurance) at all times.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 加州法律要求所有駕駛員和車主始終保持經濟責任（保險）。

questions.stem_en: When must you show proof of insurance?
questions.stem_zhHant: 什麼時候必須出示保險證明？

options.text_en: When requested by law enforcement or after a collision
options.text_zhHant: 在警察要求時或發生碰撞後

options.text_en: Only when buying a new car

questions.explanation_en: You must carry proof of insurance in your vehicle at all times. You must show it to law enforcement upon request or after a collision.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 你必須隨時在車內攜帶保險證明。在警察要求時或發生碰撞後必須出示。

questions.stem_en: Is electronic proof of insurance acceptable in California?
questions.stem_zhHant: 在加州，電子保險證明可以接受嗎？

options.text_en: No, you must carry a paper copy
options.text_zhHant: 不，你必須攜帶紙質副本

options.text_en: Yes, on your phone or device
Only if the officer agrees to accept it

questions.explanation_en: Electronic proof of insurance (on your phone or device) is acceptable in California.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 在加州，電子保險證明（手機或設備上的）是可以接受的。

questions.stem_en: Besides liability insurance, what is another way to meet California's financial responsibility requirement?
questions.stem_zhHant: 除了責任保險，還有什麼方式可以滿足加州的經濟責任要求？

options.text_en: A $10,000 cash deposit with the DMV
options.text_zhHant: 向DMV存入10,000美元現金保證金

options.text_en: A $35,000 cash deposit with the DMV
options.text_zhHant: 向DMV存入35,000美元現金保證金

options.text_en: A signed letter from your employer

questions.explanation_en: Financial responsibility can also be met by a $35,000 cash deposit with the DMV, a surety bond, or a self-insurance certificate.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 經濟責任也可以通過向DMV存入35,000美元現金保證金、擔保債券或自保證書來滿足。

questions.stem_en: What must you do if you are involved in a collision regarding insurance?
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果你發生碰撞事故，在保險方面必須做什麼？

options.text_en: Nothing — your insurance company will handle it
options.text_zhHant: 什麼都不用做——你的保險公司會處理

options.text_en: Exchange insurance information with the other parties
options.text_zhHant: 與其他相關方交換保險信息
立即打電話給你的保險代理人

options.text_en: Leave the scene and report later

questions.explanation_en: If you are involved in a collision, you must exchange insurance information with the other parties involved.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 如果你發生碰撞事故，你必須與其他相關方交換保險信息。

questions.stem_en: What are California's minimum liability insurance requirements (per person/per accident/property damage)?
questions.stem_zhHant: 加州的最低責任保險要求是多少（每人/每次事故/財產損失）？
questions.explanation_en: California's minimum liability insurance requirements are: $30,000 for a single death or injury, $60,000 for death or injury to more than one person, and $15,000 for property damage (30/60/15).
questions.explanation_zhHant: 加州最低責任保險要求為：單人傷亡30,000美元、多人傷亡60,000美元、財產損失15,000美元（30/60/15）。

questions.stem_en: What does liability insurance cover?
questions.stem_zhHant: 責任保險賠償什麼？

options.text_en: Injuries and damage you cause to others
options.text_zhHant: 你對他人造成的傷害和損失

questions.explanation_en: Liability insurance covers injuries and damage you cause to others. It does not cover damage to your own vehicle.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 責任保險賠償你對他人造成的傷害和損失。它不賠償你自己車輛的損壞。

questions.stem_en: What program does California offer for qualifying low-income drivers?
questions.stem_zhHant: 加州為符合條件的低收入駕駛員提供什麼計劃？
questions.explanation_en: California offers a Low Cost Automobile Insurance Program for qualifying low-income drivers.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 加州為符合條件的低收入駕駛員提供低成本汽車保險計劃。

questions.stem_en: Is uninsured motorist coverage required in California?
questions.stem_zhHant: 加州是否要求購買無保險駕駛員賠償險？

options.text_en: No, it is optional but recommended
options.text_zhHant: 不，它是可選的但建議購買

questions.explanation_en: Uninsured motorist coverage and collision coverage are optional but recommended to protect yourself financially.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 無保險駕駛員賠償險和碰撞險是可選的，但建議購買以保護你的經濟利益。

questions.stem_en: What is the minimum property damage coverage required by California?
questions.stem_zhHant: 加州要求的最低財產損失保險額是多少？
questions.explanation_en: California's minimum property damage liability insurance requirement is $5,000.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 加州最低財產損失責任保險要求為5,000美元。

questions.stem_en: What can happen if you drive without insurance in California?
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果你在加州無保險駕車會發生什麼？

options.text_en: Fines, vehicle impoundment, and suspension of license and registration
options.text_zhHant: 罰款、車輛被扣押以及駕照和車輛註冊被暫停

options.text_en: A small fee to the court

questions.explanation_en: Driving without insurance can result in fines, vehicle impoundment, and suspension of your driver's license and vehicle registration.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 無保險駕車可能導致罰款、車輛被扣押以及駕照和車輛註冊被暫停。

questions.stem_en: What is the maximum fine for a first offense of driving without insurance?
questions.stem_zhHant: 初次無保險駕車的最高罰款是多少？
questions.explanation_en: A first offense for driving without insurance can result in a fine of up to $500 and/or impoundment of your vehicle.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 初次無保險駕車可能被罰款最高500美元和/或車輛被扣押。

questions.stem_en: If you are involved in a collision without insurance, how long may your license be suspended?
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果你在沒有保險的情況下發生碰撞，駕照可能被吊銷多長時間？
questions.explanation_en: If involved in a collision without insurance, your license may be suspended for up to 4 years. You may need to file an SR-22 to reinstate it.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 如果在沒有保險的情況下發生碰撞，駕照可能被吊銷最長4年。你可能需要提交SR-22表格來恢復駕照。

questions.stem_en: If you cause a collision without insurance, what are you personally responsible for?
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果你在沒有保險的情況下造成碰撞事故，你個人要承擔什麼？

options.text_en: Only the damage to your own vehicle
Nothing — the state covers uninsured drivers
options.text_zhHant: 什麼都不用——州政府會為無保險駕駛員支付

options.text_en: All damages — the other party can sue you
options.text_zhHant: 所有賠償——對方可以起訴你

questions.explanation_en: You are personally liable for all damages if you cause a collision without insurance. The other party can sue you for costs exceeding insurance minimums.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 如果你在沒有保險的情況下造成碰撞事故，你個人要承擔所有賠償責任。對方可以就超出保險最低限額的費用起訴你。

questions.stem_en: What is the maximum fine for a second offense of driving without insurance?
questions.stem_zhHant: 第二次無保險駕車的最高罰款是多少？
questions.explanation_en: A second offense for no insurance can result in a fine of up to $750 and vehicle impoundment.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 第二次無保險駕車可能被罰款最高750美元並被扣車。

questions.stem_en: Within how many days must you report a collision to the DMV if there are injuries or property damage over $1,000?
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果有人受傷或財產損失超過1,000美元，你必須在幾天內向DMV報告碰撞事故？
questions.explanation_en: You must report a collision to the DMV within 10 days if anyone is injured or killed, or if property damage exceeds $1,000.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 如果有人受傷或死亡，或財產損失超過1,000美元，你必須在10天內向DMV報告碰撞事故。

questions.stem_en: What form do you use to report a collision to the DMV?
questions.stem_zhHant: 你用什麼表格向DMV報告碰撞事故？
questions.explanation_en: Use the SR-1 form (Report of Traffic Accident Occurring in California) to report collisions to the DMV.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 使用SR-1表格（加州交通事故報告）向DMV報告碰撞事故。

questions.stem_en: If you hit a parked car and cannot locate the owner, what must you do?
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果你撞到停放的車輛且找不到車主，你必須做什麼？

options.text_en: Drive away — it is not your fault
Leave a note with your name and address, and report to law enforcement
options.text_zhHant: 留下一張寫有你姓名和地址的紙條，並向執法部門報告

options.text_en: Wait by the car until the owner returns

options.text_zhHant: 只打電話給你的保險公司

questions.explanation_en: If you hit a parked car or other property and cannot locate the owner, leave a note with your name and address, and report the incident to law enforcement.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 如果你撞到停放的車輛或其他財物且找不到車主，留下一張寫有你姓名和地址的紙條，並向執法部門報告。

questions.stem_en: What crime is committed by leaving the scene of a collision with injuries?
questions.stem_zhHant: 有人受傷時離開碰撞現場構成什麼罪行？

options.text_en: No crime if you report it within 24 hours
options.text_zhHant: 如果你在24小時內報告就不構成犯罪

questions.explanation_en: Leaving the scene of a collision (hit and run) is a crime. If there are injuries, it can be charged as a felony.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 離開碰撞現場（肇事逃逸）是犯罪行為。如果有人受傷，可以被指控為重罪。

questions.stem_en: At the scene of a collision, what information must you exchange with the other parties?
questions.stem_zhHant: 在碰撞事故現場，你必須與其他方交換什麼信息？

options.text_en: Name, address, license number, and insurance information
options.text_zhHant: 姓名、地址、駕照號碼和保險信息

options.text_en: Nothing — let the police handle it
options.text_zhHant: 什麼都不用——讓警察處理

questions.explanation_en: At the scene of a collision, you must stop, exchange information (name, address, license number, insurance info), and show your driver's license.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 在碰撞事故現場，你必須停車、交換信息（姓名、地址、駕照號碼、保險信息），並出示駕照。
